title: Medical professional liability premiums rise for 7th straight year
summary: Nearly 40% of claims from leading medical liability insurers reflected year-to-year premium increases in 2025, even as the portion of physicians who have faced a lawsuit in the past year has stayed "relatively low," the American Medical Association wrote in a pair of new reports.

title: ACA subsidy lapse cost HCA Healthcare $150M in Q1
summary: The hit was in line with HCA’s expectations. The hospital operator is the first of its peers to detail financial impacts from the expiration of more generous subsidies in Affordable Care Act plans.

title: HCA Healthcare executives shrug off Q1 volumes disruptions, reaffirm FY2026 guidance
summary: A sharp end to the flu season and disruptive winter storms dragged the country's largest for-profit health system in January. Executives said there's already signs of recovery since the stumble and pointed to favorable activity among states' Medicaid subsidy programs.

title: Humana's CenterWell, Mark Cuban Cost Plus Drugs partner to tackle employers' drug costs
summary: The arrangement aims to create new "end-to-end employer prescription solutions" fueled by Cost Plus Drugs' software platform and drug pricing, as well as CenterWell Pharmacy's distribution infrastructure.

title: Solace Health expands care navigation services to commercially insured patients
summary: Solace previously connected Medicare and Medicare Advantage patients to its services, which are now also available to many commercially insured patients, including UnitedHealthcare and Anthem Blue Cross Blue Shield.

title: UChicago Medicine, Artisight partner on system-wide rollout of smart hospital platform
summary: More than 1,800 devices will be deployed across patient rooms, post-anesthesia care units, operating rooms and UChicago’s new 575,000-square-foot cancer care facility, the organizations said.

title: Healthcare finance leaders cite federal funding uncertainty, Medicaid cuts as top concerns
summary: Amid funding uncertainty, 57% of leaders report reducing costs as their top priority for the year—followed closely by managing strategic and performance improvement initiatives.

title: Flagging first-quarter volumes dragged CHS’ earnings
summary: Executives said consumer fears and aggressive denials from payers fueled declining volumes in the quarter, leading CHS to a $58 million loss. Still, the hospital operator expects volumes to pick up in the back half of the year.

summary: Nashville-based health tech startup UnityAI built out an agentic AI platform to streamline day-to-day staff scheduling and match it in real time with patient demand.

title: FTC, US Anesthesia Partners reach settlement in Texas price collusion case
